welcome.title: 🎉 New Member Joined!
welcome.description:
Welcome **{ign}**, to our guild! Thank you for signing up on the **Guild Portal.**


Your account is ready. Please log in to the **Guild Portal** to get started.

battlelog_reminder.title: 📘 Battlelog Reminder ({type})
battlelog_reminder.description: Assigned auditor **{auditor}** — please submit battlelog for **{date}**.

event_created.title: 📅 New Event Scheduled: {type}
event_created.description:
A new **{type}** event has been scheduled for **{date}**. Please check your attendance.

We look forward to seeing you at the **{type}**.

auction_results.description:
Your **Auction** item for **{name}** has been finalized! 

📝 **IMPORTANT:**
**Select the `FEATHER or CARD ALBUM Tab` first before you start counting the bids.**

📖 **Legend:**
• **P** = Page
• **R** = Row
• **P1** = Full Page 1 (You will get the whole page)
• **P1R1** = Page 1, Row 1 (Individual Slot or Coordinates)

⚠️ **Note:** The number depends on where your bid items are located in the slots.
